use_cases: HTML board pages with inconsistent markup
JavaScript-rendered pages where static requests miss content
detail pages that need clean Markdown extraction
notes: Use as a fallback or adapter bootstrap tool, not as the only primary source.
Promote stable extracted selectors or URLs into deterministic adapters.
Keep raw crawl output in data/raw for QC and reproducibility.

use_cases: One-off extraction from a difficult page when selector rules are not yet known
Generating a draft extraction schema from a sample city/county board
Converting unstructured HTML, XML, JSON, or Markdown into a target JSON shape
notes: LLM-based extraction can be helpful for bootstrapping but should not be the normal daily path.
Any recurring extraction should be converted into deterministic code and tests.
Disable telemetry in automated environments where appropriate.
Archive prompts and outputs for auditability when LLM extraction is used.
